name: Tiger Shark (The Carnage)
description:
"No way out they always scream, trapped within a broken dream..."

UPDATE 1.0: Changed pfp from placeholder to an official one, will be remastered a bit later on.

««⟨LORE⟩»»

After the events of Colin leaving Tiger Shark had decided to pick up a book, learning how to speak and read. Before finding another book about sea-life and it's food chains, after thorough reading he seen a Shark stop the food chain, he then thought he was supposed to be on the top of the food chain; Consequently, he began killing all sea life he came in touch with. Even Humans. The lab since Colin left has since became abandoned and destroyed, Latex creatures killing and consuming each other to survive, Tiger Shark being the true definition of carnage...
